For Judgmnt On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Jan-06-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR JUDGMNT ON THE PLEADINGS is GRANTED as requested against San Francisco Public Administrator, as Successor Trustee of the Ethel H. Bradford Living Trust Dated January 22, 1997 only. Plaintiff shall not recover costs.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)
